mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.description, c.sort_order AS sortOrder, c.status, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, COUNT(b.id) AS blogCount FROM t_category c LEFT JOIN t_blog b ON c.id = b.category_id
c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.description, c.sort_order, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.description, c.sort_order AS sortOrder, c.status, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, COUNT(b.id) AS blogCount FROM t_category c LEFT JOIN t_blog b ON c.id = b.category_id AND b.status = 1 WHERE c.status = 1 GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.description, c.sort_order, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.created_at DESC
